description: Google Cloud Access Approval is a service for controlling and approving certain Google personnel access to customer data and resources. It lets organizations review, approve, dismiss, and audit access requests for enrolled Google Cloud services.
summary: Access Approval exposes a REST API at `https://accessapproval.googleapis.com` authenticated with Google Cloud OAuth 2.0 bearer tokens, plus a public MCP endpoint at `https://accessapproval.googleapis.com/mcp` per detected catalog facts.
